# Daily Report — 2026-06-09

## Task Completed
Added `resolve_sla_breach` tool — PATCHes a `task_sla` record with `paused=true`
and `stage=completed` to administratively close out a breach after the underlying
task has been actioned. Accepts an optional `work_notes` field for audit purposes.
Registered in `service_desk`, `system_administrator`, and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1504
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing environment packages (setuptools 68.1.2, urllib3 2.6.3, wheel 0.42.0)
have known CVEs — not project dependencies, no action required.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/sla_tools.py` — added `ResolveSLABreachParams` model and `resolve_sla_breach` function
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — exported `resolve_sla_breach`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported params + function, added tool registry entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `resolve_sla_breach` to service_desk, system_administrator, and full packages
- `tests/test_sla_tools.py` — 12 new tests covering success, PATCH body contents, 404, HTTP errors, work_notes, URL format, and field normalisation
